title: cynoglossum leptostachyum
intro: Cynoglossum leptostachyum is a plant species, also known as Chinese forget-me-not, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is said to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, including bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum leptostachyum is often combined with other herbs and used as a tea, tincture, or powder to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
